dimension_catalog.label: Power Source Type
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product uses disposable batteries (AA/AAA) vs USB rechargeable power. High=rechargeable; Low=disposable battery only.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: the only MB line trimmer from urbaner that is rechargeable, the rest of the MB line uses AA batteries

dimension_catalog.label: Rechargeable Design
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product supports USB or dock recharging without replacing batteries. High=USB rechargeable; Low=battery only.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Great and USB C – Before I talk about the actual device, I want to mention that this charges with a USB C cable, which is the current standard.

dimension_catalog.label: USB-C Charging
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product charges via USB-C (modern universal standard). High=USB-C supported; Low=proprietary or older port.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: I have another grooming kit that charges with micro USB, but this one charges with USB C

dimension_catalog.label: Charging Dock / Base
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether a standalone charging dock or base is included. High=dedicated charging base included; Low=no base.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: I do wish the charger plugged right into the clipper, rather than having a charging base

dimension_catalog.label: AA Battery Power
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product uses AA batteries (larger capacity vs AAA). High=AA powered; relevant for products not rechargeable.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: I'm not sure I like the idea of a battery because I'd rather have a USB rechargeable

dimension_catalog.label: AAA Battery Power
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product uses AAA batteries (compact, lighter). Relevant for pen-type devices.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Requires 1 AAA battery (included) – pen-type eyebrow trimmer

dimension_catalog.label: Battery Included in Package
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the package includes batteries so the device is ready to use out of box. High=batteries included; Low=batteries not included.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: The Battery IS Included!!! Classy elegant gift for the man who is always fully groomed!!! Comes beautifully boxed and actually includes a very good quality name brand AA battery

dimension_catalog.label: Battery / Charge Life Duration
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: How long the device operates on a single charge or battery set. High=long runtime (90min+); Low=short runtime.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Holds a charge for quite a while and cuts well!

dimension_catalog.label: Wall Plug / Adapter Included
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether a wall plug/power adapter is included with the USB charging cable. High=included; Low=cable only, no plug.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: the shaver comes with a charging base and USB cable to allow it to be connected – wall plug not included

dimension_catalog.label: Japanese Motor
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the motor is sourced from Japan (typically higher torque, quieter). High=genuine Japanese motor; Low=generic.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Japanese Motor, USB Charger, IPX8 Waterproof – top-listed feature on product page

dimension_catalog.label: Japanese High-Carbon Steel Blade
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether blades are made from Japanese high-carbon steel (sharper, more durable). High=Japanese steel confirmed; Low=unspecified steel.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: high-carbon steel blade from Japan ensuring safety without risk of scratching or hurting skin

dimension_catalog.label: Blade Sharpness
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Perceived cutting sharpness from reviews. High=reviewers praise clean cuts; Low=dull, hair-snagging complaints.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Cheap, Cheerful, and Surprisingly Sharp – I've used this URBANER Precision Mustache Trimmer a handful of times now

dimension_catalog.label: Blade Hair Pulling / Snagging
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether blade snags or pulls hair during use. High=smooth, no pulling; Low=frequent pulling complaints.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Dull razor – The blade for this trimmer is not very sharp. Instead of gliding smooth, it tends to snag the hair.

dimension_catalog.label: Motor Power / Speed
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Perceived motor power and RPM. High=strong, powerful motor; Low=weak, slow motor.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Does not trim well at all. Motor speed is slow. No adjustable speeds.

dimension_catalog.label: Blade Width
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Physical width of the cutting blade. High=wider blade (faster coverage); Low=narrower blade (more precision).
dimension_catalog.example_quote: The 0.8-inch blade on this URBANER Mustache Trimmer is exactly what I needed for precision work

dimension_catalog.label: Replaceable Blade
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the trimmer blade can be replaced when worn. High=replaceable blade; Low=non-replaceable.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: 2 blades included in package

dimension_catalog.label: Ceramic Blade (Heat Reduction)
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether a ceramic blade is used to reduce heat by up to 70% (relevant for pet/sensitive skin use). High=ceramic blade; Low=standard metal blade.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: The ceramic blade can effectively reduce heat by up to 70%

dimension_catalog.label: Cutting Precision
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Precision of the cut for detail work (mustache edges, eyebrow lines). High=highly precise; Low=imprecise, can't hold lines.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: If you're looking for a dedicated mustache trimmer, this is fantastic! The adjustable blade delivers incredibly precise cuts

dimension_catalog.label: Foil Shaver Head Included
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether a foil shaver attachment is included in the kit. High=foil shaver head included; Low=not included.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: The foil shaver works fine, but it's not a replacement for a dedicated foil shaver

dimension_catalog.label: IPX8 Waterproof Rating
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product carries the IPX8 waterproof certification (submersible). High=IPX8 certified; Low=water resistant or not rated.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Capable Travel Trimmer – IPX8 Rating Shines

dimension_catalog.label: Shower-Safe Use
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product can be used safely during a shower. High=shower-safe confirmed; Low=only splash resistant.

dimension_catalog.label: Rinse-Under-Tap Cleaning
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the head/body can be rinsed under running water for cleaning. High=fully rinsable; Low=only brush cleaning.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: You can simply rinse it clean when you've finished

dimension_catalog.label: Wet & Dry Dual Use
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product can be used both wet (shower/cream) and dry. High=full wet+dry capability; Low=dry use only.

dimension_catalog.label: Number of Grooming Functions
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Total count of distinct grooming functions (beard, nose, ear, eyebrow, etc.). High=4+ functions; Low=single function.

dimension_catalog.label: Beard Trimming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Effectiveness at trimming beard hair. High=good beard coverage and cut; Low=poor beard performance.

dimension_catalog.label: Nose Hair Trimming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Effectiveness at trimming nose hair including how well the head fits the nostril. High=powerful and fits well; Low=too large or weak.

dimension_catalog.label: Ear Hair Trimming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Effectiveness at trimming ear hair. High=works well in ears; Low=not effective or hard to use in ears.

dimension_catalog.label: Eyebrow Trimming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Effectiveness at shaping eyebrows. High=precise and painless; Low=imprecise or uncomfortable.

dimension_catalog.label: Mustache Trimming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Effectiveness and precision for mustache trimming specifically. High=clean edges, good detail; Low=imprecise.

dimension_catalog.label: Sideburn Trimming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Effectiveness at styling and trimming sideburns. High=good line and precision; Low=not suitable.

dimension_catalog.label: Chest / Body Hair Trimming

dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Ability to remove fine facial hair (peach fuzz) especially for women. High=gentle and effective; Low=misses fine hairs.

dimension_catalog.label: Pet Grooming Function
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product is designed for grooming pets (cats/dogs). High=purpose-built for pets; Low=human use only.

dimension_catalog.label: Head / Scalp Hair Trimming

dimension_catalog.label: Adjustable Comb Length Settings
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Number and range of adjustable length settings via comb. High=many settings with fine increments; Low=fixed or few settings.

dimension_catalog.label: Stepless / Continuous Length Adjustment

dimension_catalog.label: Speed Settings
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Number of speed modes available. High=2+ speeds; Low=single speed only.

dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Comfort and control during hand-held use. High=comfortable non-slip grip; Low=slippery or awkward.

dimension_catalog.label: Narrow Cutter Head for Line Definition
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product has a specifically narrow cutter head for creating clean beard/mustache lines. High=narrow head; Low=wide standard head.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: The narrow cutter head helps create clean lines for mustache or sideburns

dimension_catalog.label: Nose Trimmer Head Fit in Nostril
dimension_catalog.label_zh: 鼻毛刀頭鼻孔適配尺寸
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the nose trimmer head is appropriately sized to fit comfortably in nostril. High=correctly sized; Low=too large or too small.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Bad size nose trimmer – The nose trimmer is useless as it is too large for the nose hair.

dimension_catalog.label: Product Physical Dimensions
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Exact physical dimensions (length x width x depth in cm). Smaller dimensions = more portable.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: 14 x 2 x 2 cm – compact slim profile for travel

dimension_catalog.label: Battery Cover / Compartment Ease
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Ease of accessing and replacing the battery compartment cover. High=easy open/close; Low=fiddly or hard to open.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: battery cover design for 2 AA batteries

dimension_catalog.label: Overall Multi-Use Versatility Score
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Composite sense of how many different grooming tasks the product can handle well. High=true all-in-one; Low=single-task only.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Perfect trimmer for all the little places – This trimmer kit includes everything you need to trim hair from all those odd places such as nose, ears, eyebrows, facial hair

dimension_catalog.label: Maintenance / Oiling Requirement
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product requires regular oiling or maintenance to keep performance. High=low-maintenance; Low=requires frequent oiling.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: maintenance oil included in package

dimension_catalog.label: Full Body Waterproof (Not Just Head)
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the entire device body (not just the head) is waterproof. High=fully submersible body; Low=only head is water-resistant.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: IPX8 Waterproof – can be fully submerged

dimension_catalog.label: Grooming Kit Completeness
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: How complete the grooming kit is for all common facial hair needs in one package. High=all-in-one complete kit; Low=partial kit.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: A nice selection of cutting heads – I have used a variety of different powered trimmers over the years but this one has the widest selection of trimming attachments.

dimension_catalog.label: Lightweight Design
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product is specifically lightweight for ease of one-hand use and travel. High=very light; Low=heavier/bulkier.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Small and Safe Grooming Tool, Lightweight

dimension_catalog.label: Dedicated Eyebrow Comb Attachment
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether a dedicated eyebrow guide comb is included. High=separate eyebrow comb included; Low=no dedicated eyebrow comb.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: includes eyebrow comb attachment

dimension_catalog.label: Quick Touch-Up / Daily Use Design
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product is optimized for quick daily touch-ups rather than full grooming sessions. High=fast, daily-use friendly; Low=setup-intensive.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: I needed something small and accurate for quick touch-ups between full shaves

dimension_catalog.label: Perceived Premium Feel
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Whether the product feels premium/high-end beyond its price point. High=feels premium; Low=feels cheap for price.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: I was not expecting it to be this good – I bought a ton of these kind of things over my lifetime and most of them are cheap garbage. But I was really not expecting a whole lot from these.

dimension_catalog.label: Grooming Angle / Attack Angle Control
dimension_catalog.plain_language_definition: Ease of controlling the trimming angle for precise detailing work. High=good angle control; Low=awkward angle.
dimension_catalog.example_quote: Grip is good and the attack angle allows accurate detailing

attribute_extraction_summary.shortfall_reason: none — pre-frozen catalog of 114 attributes reused across markets
attribute_extraction_summary.scoring_note: Salience via bilingual keyword matching, length & density weighted; quality via star-rating proxy + attribute-specific negative-signal adjustment.

system1_system2_split.rationale: System 1 = sensory cues at first contact; System 2 = deliberate comparison features.
